function a(a)return l[a+(-232573-(-240286))]end for a,u in ipairs({{416192+-416191,-633919-(-635144)};{768772+-768771,-469474-(-470654)};{111189+-110008;738628+-737403}})do while u[558446-558445]<u[-219458-(-219460)]do
